daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic right now. The cosmos is giving you permission to take up space and trust your instincts. Move with intention, even if it's just small shifts in perspective.
daily.love: Someone's noticing your energy shift. Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, there's a sweetness in authenticity today. Let people see the real you—it's your superpower.
daily.career: Your ideas have weight today. Don't minimize them in the group chat or meeting. This is your gentle nudge to speak up and own your perspective. Your voice matters.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. Dance, walk, stretch—whatever makes you feel alive. Listen to what your energy is craving, not what you think you should do.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is pushing you to trust your instincts more. Venus is vibing in your favor, so lean into those gut feelings about people and situations. It's giving main character energy—own it.
weekly.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, authenticity is your love language this week. Stop performing and start being real. The right people are magnetized to genuine you, not the polished version you think they want.
weekly.career: Your creative spark is activated. Don't sleep on that idea you've been overthinking. Present it, pitch it, or just start building it. Your confidence will naturally rise as you take action, so move first and trust yourself.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more movement and less scrolling. Not in a punishing way—find something that genuinely feels good. Dancing, walking, stretching, whatever makes you feel alive in your skin. That's your medicine right now.
